title: Surgeon Vacancy at Breach Candy Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Breach Candy Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!
